kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Generate Random String
kw.doc: Generates a string with a desired ``length`` from the given ``chars``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/setup/admin path_url=/api/v1/setup/admin headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '80', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"name": "Admin User", "email": "admin_26658@email.com", "password": "admin123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/auth/login path_url=/api/v1/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '58', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "admin_26658@email.com", "password": "admin123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/v1/movies path_url=/api/v1/movies headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5ZDZkNDllZGRjYjU5N2I0YmI3YTE3MiIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTY4NjgxNCwiZXhwIjoxNzc1NzczMjE0fQ.vWI9IfXS_PmImeybU1n3kz6TYO2fIEsD6oLA74atgJU'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.
